title: Trump news at a glance: US fires on Iranian-flagged tanker as president fires off post threatening more bombing
description: Trump warned Tehran to agree to deal or face attacks ‘at a much higher level and intensity’ than before – key US politics stories from 6 May 2026 at a glance
content: The US military fired on an Iranian-flagged oil tanker on Wednesday, shortly after Donald Trump issued a fresh ultimatum to Tehran, telling it to accept a deal to end the war or face a new wave of US bombing “at a much higher level and intensity than... [846 chars]

title: German tourist wins payout after losing sun lounger race
description: The man sued his tour operator for allowing people to reserve sun loungers with towels despite a hotel ban on the practice.
content:
A German tourist has won a payout of more than €900 (£850) after he was unable to secure a sun lounger due to other guests reserving them with towels.
The man, who has not been identified, was on holiday in Greece with his family in 2024, and said he... [1276 chars]

title: 'That's not how it works'
description: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.
content:
As the world's richest man, with a net-worth of over three-quarters of a trillion dollars, Elon Musk's resources and connections often make it easy for him bend Silicon Valley to his will.

title: Millions across England, Scotland and Wales to vote in key elections
description: The polls on Thursday will be the biggest test of public opinion since the general election in 2024.
content:
Millions of people across England, Scotland and Wales are set to vote in the largest set of polls since the general election in 2024.

title: Man City WSL title: 'I had a feeling', says boss Andree Jeglertz
description: Manchester City manager Andree Jeglertz says he "had a feeling from the beginning" that his side would win the Women's Super League title this year, with the club's ambition, quality and hunger the key.
content:
Manchester City manager Andree Jeglertz says he "had a feeling from the beginning" that his side would win this season's Women's Super League.
